channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
item.description: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

item.title: Netflix used AI to put Gene Wilder's voice into a new reality show
item.description: So much for magic.

item.title: The Supreme Court will hear an appeal in the long-running case between Apple and Epic Games
item.description: Apple filed an appeal after being found in contempt of an order related to App Store fees.

item.title: TerraMaster F4-425 Pro NAS review: An improvement on predecessors, but falls short of what others are bringing to the same party
item.description: The TerraMaster F4-425 Pro is a sophisticated four-bay NAS at a price that makes sense for both home and small business users.

item.title: Acer’s Swift Go 16 is a lot of laptop for $900
item.description: As high memory and storage prices have driven up the cost of everything from consoles to computers, finding a competent laptop for under $1,000 has become a challenge. Thankfully, the Acer Swift Go 16 AI is on sale for $899.99 at Best Buy, a steep discount from its usual list price of $1,549.99. The well-equipped […]

item.title: Control Resonant's ray tracing is a heavy demand on the RTX 5090 — but it's an absolute delight to the eyes
item.description: I played Control Resonant for two hours on an RTX 5090 with high ray tracing, and it's easily one of 2026's best-looking games.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg pushes back against AI job loss fears after Meta’s own layoffs
item.description: During a recent live interview with Complex, the Meta CEO pushed back against the idea that mass AI job displacement is inevitable. During a recent interview at Complex’s Idea Generation, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg addressed one of the industry’s most contentious points: whether or not AI will lead to mass job displacement.

item.title: A Korean student designed the perfect WFH desk for small apartments, and I hope Samsung now teams up with him
item.description: A Korean student's DuoShift desk uses one physical motion to separate work and home life, replacing software-based focus solutions entirely.

item.title: What is an AI agent builder? And why should businesses consider using it?
item.description: A plain-English guide to what AI agent builders are, how they work, and why more businesses are turning to them to automate real work, not just chat.

item.title: Anthropic finally, officially launches Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, narrowing the performance gap with Opus 4.8 while undercutting it on price.

item.title: The USDA is preparing to release 180 million flies. Here’s why
item.description: The parasitic fly, whose larvae feed on living tissue, has now been detected in multiple Texas counties. In an effort to combat the threat of flesh-eating parasitic flies, The US Department of Agriculture (USDA) turned to a surprising solution: sterile flies.

item.title: Inside the rise of the global scam-economy powered by AI and Starlink
item.description: Technology from American companies is being used to power a revolution in the scam industry. The instructions were clear: He had four days to make each victim fall in love.And there were a lot of victims. Online, Safeer Mohammed Koorimannil, who was trafficked to a scam center in Myanmar, impersonated a 28-year-old Singaporean woman named Ella. On a typical shift, he said, he chatted with more than 100 people across dozens of profiles at the same time, as supervisors prowled among the desks with electric batons.In just a month, Koorimannil targeted some 50,000 victims from at least 17 countrie...

item.title: Google’s NotebookLM can sum up your research in a TikTok-style clip
item.description: Google's NotebookLM is adding a new way to catch up on your notes: TikTok-style AI videos. The new feature is rolling out to Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers, allowing NotebookLM to generate 60-second vertical AI clips based on the sources you upload to the app. The example shared by Google details Australia's unsuccessful war […]

item.title: Test du GMKtec EVO-X2 : AMD Strix Halo, 128 Go de RAM unifiée et un iGPU au niveau d’une RTX 4060
item.description: Avec son AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395, ses 128 Go de mémoire unifiée et son iGPU Radeon 8060S capable de faire tourner un modèle de 120 milliards de paramètres en local, le GMKtec EVO-X2 dépasse largement le cadre du mini PC classique. C'est une station d'IA locale dans un boîtier d'à peine plus d'un litre.

item.title: How to watch CazeTV from outside Brazil with a VPN
item.description: Here's how to watch CazeTV from outside Brazil in case you're traveling around but still want to catch sporting action like the World Cup 2026.

item.title: Realta Fusion generates electricity directly from a fusion reaction, an apparent first
item.description: “We can take power from a plasma,” Kieran Furlong, co-founder and CEO of Realta Fusion, told TechCrunch. The milestone shows “what’s possible,” he added.

item.title: On a trouvé en stock l’un des meilleurs climatiseurs De’Longhi du moment
item.description: Alors que les fortes chaleurs s'installent, trouver un bon climatiseur mobile disponible et en stock relève parfois du défi. Le De'Longhi Pinguino Compact ES72 YOUNG, un modèle de référence que nous conseillons régulièrement, est actuellement proposé pour 419,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Newsom strikes Anthropic deal to get California government half price Claude AI access
item.description: Anthropic has provided the Californian government with access to Claude, with a 50% discount.

item.title: This near-perfect GoPro Hero 13 Black bundle crashes to a new record-low price
item.description: The GoPro Hero 13 Black bundle drops to a new record-low price of $379.99 at Amazon, so now's a great time to buy one of the best action cameras out there.

item.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
item.description: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

item.title: On avait tout faux : la matière noire change complètement ce que l'on pensait de la naissance des premières étoiles !
item.description: Une nouvelle étude remet en cause l’idée selon laquelle les premières étoiles de l’Univers se seraient formées dans des environnements calmes et auraient été presque toutes extrêmement massives.

item.title: 19 leaders on promoting from within versus hiring externally
item.description: The decision isn’t always about loyalty and internal knowledge. When creating a more senior position or needing to fill a current one, leaders need to decide where to go for that talent. On one hand, promoting from within rewards loyal employees who may be interested in moving up and gaining new responsibilities. On the other hand, they may not have the capabilities or experience to fill that role. Hire them when they’re not ready, and they could fail, harming your business and causing management challenges. Don’t hire them, and you could experience other management issues: They may feel hurt ...

item.title: How to watch France vs. Sweden online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream France vs. Sweden in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.
